title: Restrictions on Waiver of Entitlement to Repatriation. A waiver of
content: 31 entitlement to repatriation shall be valid only if it is written, and made freely and voluntarily, 32 with full knowledge of its consequences. 33 34 When a seafarer is abandoned, detained, held captive on or off the ship as a result of 35 acts of piracy, terrorism, hijacking, or armed robbery against the ship, or is incapable of 36 traveling due to illness, injury or incapacity, or other causes that affect the seafarer’s 37 safety and security, no waiver shall be allowed or presumed. 38 39 40 Warlike and High-Risk Areas and Insurance 41 42
